text: So, I ordered a pair of shoes and a t-shirt last week, right? But I only got the t-shirt. I mean, I don’t wanna be the annoying customer, but like, where are my shoes? I was really looking forward to wearing them! Can I get a refund for the shoes? I know I said I wanted a replacement earlier, but honestly, I just need my money back now. It's been forever and I didn’t think it would take this long, especially since I got some random shirt instead. Seems unfair, you know?

I can’t believe I paid for this premium service and it’s been nothing but problems! Every time I try to use it, it crashes. This is just so frustrating. I really thought I was upgrading to something better, but it feels worse than the free version. What’s going on? This is not what I signed up for!

Hey there! So, I’ve got this issue that’s kinda bugging me. I noticed I was charged twice for my subscription this month (like what??), and I’m really hoping you could help me out with a refund for that second charge. It’s Order #12345. Thanks a ton!
I can't log into my account even after resetting my password. It keeps saying my email isn’t recognized.

I’ve been experiencing countless issues with your service, and this has left me quite dissatisfied. Additionally, I have some unrelated concerns about your billing practices that may not even pertain to my account. Can someone assist me?
Hey, I tried to get my money back for the last order but it’s like nobody’s on it? I mean, it’s been over a week, and I can’t figure out what's the hold up. Can someone please help me out here?

Hey, I'm super stressed out because I can't find the info about my last order anywhere! I thought I saved it, but it’s just not showing up. Can you help me figure out what’s going on? Like, did it even go through? I just don’t understand why it’s so hard to track this stuff!
Hey, quick question! Is there a limit on how many requests I can send to your API? Just trying to figure it out.
hey, i updated my acc info but now it won’t let me log in? like wth, tried couple of times and it just says my email is wrong.

Hey there! I'm in a bit of a pickle because I ordered a product a couple of weeks ago, and it was supposed to arrive by now, but it hasn't. I really needed it for a project, and I'm not sure what's going on. Can I get a refund for it since it didn’t arrive as promised? I’d appreciate any help you can give me on this.

Hey, my app's been crashing all day! Like, I just wanted to watch a video but it keeps freezing and I have to restart my phone. Also, I think I saw a cat outside when it crashed for the third time. Anyway, any ideas on what's going on?
I can't believe how terrible this service is! I’ve been waiting for help for ages and no one seems to care. Like, why is it taking so long? I just wanna get this sorted out already!!

Hey there! I'm really trying to wrap my head around the various features that come with the different tiers of your service. Like, could someone help me understand what exactly makes the pro tier stand out compared to the business tier? I read some info, but honestly, I'm a bit lost with all the details and just want to make sure I'm choosing the right one for my needs.

Hey, so like, I was trying to find out when my order is coming. Ya know, I kinda forgot if I even got a tracking number or what. Also, my friend said she had a similar issue, but she got her stuff way faster. Just wondering...
Hey, I thought I deleted my old account, but I still see my info when I log in. That's weird, right? I shouldn’t be able to access it if it’s gone or whatever.
I tried to log in, but it says my password is wrong? I've changed it like, 3 times now. Can’t access my account. What’s going on?
